name: Bay Leaf Tree in Basket - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add a lovely touch of nature to your decor without the need for watering with this Bay Leaf Tree in Basket from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Designed to look just like a real bay tree, this artificial plant comes in a basket pot with faux soil filler for instant display. Standing 72 inches high, it's great for placement in the corner of any room.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
